# Ontario Masonry & Brick Repair Experts

## Get Your Brick Fixed Today

Cracked joints, spalled brick, failing chimney? We quote on site, match your masonry, and keep the site clean—start to finish.

Why homeowners call us

## Loose brick, mortar falling out, a leaning chimney, or water stains all signal the masonry has started to fail.

Homeowners call us when they want the underlying issue fixed, the brick matched, and the site protected. We point out what failed, how we’ll fix it, and exactly how we’ll stage the job.

22+

Years in business

2,500+

Projects completed

100+

Cities served

2-Year

Warranty

Before & After

## See the Transformation

Our repairs blend seamlessly with your existing masonry. Slide to see the difference.

Brick RepairPargingChimney Repair

### Spalled Brick Repair

Water damage and freeze-thaw cycles had caused extensive spalling. We replaced damaged bricks with matching units and repointed the surrounding joints.

![Damaged brick wall with spalling and deteriorated mortar before repair](https://imagedelivery.net/NzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA/02e4a8d8-5c80-4668-4075-b72bb26fd700/instagramPost)

BEFORE

![Restored brick wall with seamless brick replacement and fresh mortar joints](https://imagedelivery.net/NzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA/5cc6ce17-7dc0-458a-f379-133c7f1cb100/instagramPost)

AFTER

![Restored brick wall with seamless brick replacement and fresh mortar joints](https://imagedelivery.net/NzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA/5cc6ce17-7dc0-458a-f379-133c7f1cb100/instagramPost)

Brick Repair

Parging

Chimney Repair

## What we fix most often

From chimney rebuilds to parging and tuckpointing, these are the scopes homeowners book when cracks and leaks start showing up.

![Brick repair with matched mortar joints and replaced units](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F549fc981-1c45-47ff-1377-fb98a395f000%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Brick Repair

Remove loose or spalled units, match the brick and mortar, and rebuild the area so the repair disappears.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/brick-repair)

![Chimney repair and rebuild – completed, watertight stack with new cap](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2Fa647271e-958b-4339-c51d-1d75a3de3f00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Chimney Services

Repair, rebuild, or remove unsafe stacks and add proper crowns, caps, and flashing so the chimney stays dry.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/chimney-repair)

![Clean tuckpointing with matched mortar joints](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F53b32ea1-8e32-457d-c46c-343cd1734e00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Tuckpointing

Cut out failing mortar and repoint with mixes that match the color, joint profile, and era of the home.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/tuckpointing)

![Foundation parging with smooth, clean finish](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F4f525ad4-e4b4-439c-cc77-07bcd481b800%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Parging & Foundation Repair

Prep, bond, and parge foundation walls and entries so flaking surfaces are sealed and ready for weather.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/parging)

![Stone masonry work with natural stone and professional finish](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F3583e9d2-7451-4b79-4803-8cbbc8d81900%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Stone Masonry

Repair flagstone, porches, and retaining walls or install new stone with proper drainage and tight joints.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/stone-masonry)

![Heritage masonry restoration preserving historic architectural details](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Foveieyfzkpgdaoiwqzaf.supabase.co%2Fstorage%2Fv1%2Fobject%2Fpublic%2Fimage_repository%2Fd4b454f0-79cd-48af-8a38-853a65e5c50e%2F1764876860208-bff82tlrpcm.jpg&w=2048&q=75)

Heritage Restoration

Lime mortar, period-correct brickwork, and heritage-safe detailing to keep older buildings breathable and compliant.

[Learn more →](https://fixmybrick.ca/services/heritage-masonry-restoration)

Real homeowners • Real outcomes

## Proof that the repairs blend in and hold up

Every quote links back to a Google review. The themes repeat: crews show up when they say they will, match the original brick, and leave the site spotless.

![Crew cleaning a brick repair workspace leaving it spotless](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F3a30d9b9-9f27-4cc5-1b65-901b78c0bb00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Our #1 most mentioned quality

### We Leave Your Property Cleaner Than We Found It

> “Despite removing bricks and creating dust and debris everywhere, they cleaned up absolutely everything. The work area was left spotlessly clean - you'd never know they'd been there!”

— Sarah K.

![Perfectly matched brick repair showcasing seamless colour blending](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2Fbb063a5a-5f98-4c7b-d8f7-cf84cbbfd700%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Perfect matching, every time

### Seamless Repairs You Can't Detect

> “You cannot tell which bricks are new or old and they all blended in together just like they were all original there. Awesome work!”

— Jasmine L.

![Crew arriving on time for a homeowner appointment](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F36d5e981-07b5-4317-34c9-01a341151600%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)

Always on time, always on budget

### We Respect Your Time & Your Property

Transparent schedules, text updates before arrival, and job files that spell out every task ensure you know exactly what happens—and when.

> “Ryan and Paolo arrived right on time and finished everything as promised. They were so thorough, they even fixed extra issues they discovered along the way. True professionals from start to finish.”

— Lisa M.

827\+ reviews•4.9★ average on Google

[Read every review →](https://fixmybrick.ca/reviews)

Janet D.

Brick Repair

“I would highly recommend this company for any repairs. They replaced my entire chimney and you wouldn't even know it was replaced. The bricks matched so well. They left the yard very tidy and neat. Very pleasant respectful workers. Reasonable prices. Thank you Mike, Ryan and Ben.”

Google Review

Chris B.

Brick Repair

“Ryan and his team from Fix My Bricks repaired the cracks in my mortar. The team was outstanding! Very efficient, very polite and very clean. My initial contact was with Ryan . The team came to the house did the work and when they left I noticed the mortar was a little darker than it should be and I was told it would dry to the natural colour. Unfortunately it did not get any lighter after a 6 month period. I called Ryan and explained the situation, he came by and met with me and agreed fully and guaranteed me that he would fix the problem. Ryan came back with the team and not only fixed the issues but used that time as a training”

Google Review

Murray M.

Brick Repair

“It has been a pleasure dealing with this company, from the original quote to the finished job. I was pleased both with the responses of Erica and Joe in the front office (when I had to call there to sort a couple of things out) and especially with the work crew (Luke, assisted by Karic and John). They protected the garden and the cedar roof and did a thorough clean-up as well as a fantastic job on the chimney. I was very concerned about brick match on my 1920's architect-designed home, and this outfit went out of its way to ensure my satisfaction, bringing over 200 reclaimed bricks from which I could pick out the best matches for a job that called for only 25 replacement bricks. I have another job (rebuilding a brick-and-stone wall), which I'll probably put off till next year, but I'll get Fix My Brick to do it. Of the two quotes I got, theirs was the higher, but I went with them because Ryan, who came out to quote the job, inspired more confidence than the competitor. I'd advise other homeowners to do as I did.”

Google Review

How it works

### Here’s the crew playbook once you give us the go-ahead.

On-site assessment → clear scope → schedule → site protection → repair → cleanup and walkthrough. Same foreman from first visit to final sign-off.

Our Process

## How We Work

Transparent process, quality results. Here's what to expect.

![Mason assessing damaged masonry for repair planning](https://oveieyfzkpgdaoiwqzaf.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/gallery-images/galleries/1554/1763056064534-4gtftos6414.jpeg)

1

Before

### We Assess the Problem

We inspect the damage, identify what caused it, and plan the fix. No shortcuts—just a clear path to doing it right.

![Mason actively working on masonry repair with attention to detail](https://imagedelivery.net/NzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA/dc66412d-2924-4cf3-acd6-2b8538308f00/instagramPost)

2

During

### We Fix It Properly

Clean prep, proper materials, careful execution. We're detail-oriented because the small stuff determines how long the work lasts.

![Completed masonry work with clean professional finish](https://imagedelivery.net/NzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA/4e4a3d56-cd63-4f6a-9a0f-86deb1d85400/instagramPost)

3

After

### Clean Site, Solid Results

Repairs that blend in, a site you'd never know we touched, and a warranty you can count on.

### What You Can Expect

#### Written Scope

Clear documentation of what's included in every project

#### Clear Communication

We let you know when we're coming, what we're doing, and when we're done

#### Final Walkthrough

We review the finished work together before sign-off

Ready to get started? Book a free on-site estimate.

## Our Work

Browse real masonry projects across Ontario.

[![Brick wall before restoration](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F94950305-6c81-4255-dc36-c21fc3b20000%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Tuckpointing and Window Sill Restoration in Vaughan, Ontario** \\
\\
A homeowner in Vaughan, Ontario noticed deteriorating mortar joints and damaged brick window sills that compromised both the appearance and weather protection of their home's exterior. The two existing brick window sills had reached the end of their functional life, while cracked mortar throughout the marked work area threatened to worsen with each freeze-thaw cycle. Additionally, a foundation crack required immediate attention to prevent water infiltration. The homeowner needed a comprehensive restoration that would address structural concerns while upgrading the property's aesthetic appeal.\\
\\
Our team developed a targeted restoration plan focusing on the most critical areas within the marked work zone. The tuckpointing work began with grinding out all cracked and deteriorated mortar joints, creating clean, properly sized channels for the new mortar. We specified Type N mortar with a custom mix formulated to closely match the existing mortar's colour and texture, ensuring visual consistency across the entire façade. This careful colour-matching prevents the patchwork appearance that can result from mismatched mortar repairs.\\
\\
The window sill replacement represented a significant upgrade for the property. Our team carefully removed the two deteriorating brick sills and replaced them with new Indiana Limestone sills featuring a 2¼-inch rock face profile. This upgrade provided not only aesthetic enhancement with the stone's clean, natural appearance but also functional improvement through proper slope installation that ensures water drainage away from the window openings. The limestone's durability offers superior weather resistance compared to the original brick construction.\\
\\
The foundation crack repair addressed a critical structural concern, preventing potential water infiltration that could compromise the foundation's integrity over time. To complete the restoration, we removed all deteriorated caulking around the window perimeters and applied fresh brown exterior-grade caulking, creating weathertight seals that protect against Ontario's temperature extremes and precipitation.\\
\\
The completed work eliminated moisture infiltration pathways while significantly enhancing the home's curb appeal. The Indiana Limestone sills provide a refined architectural detail that elevates the property's character, while the comprehensive tuckpointing and foundation repairs ensure structural integrity for years to come. The project demonstrates how targeted masonry restoration can address multiple concerns—structural, functional, and aesthetic—in a unified approach that protects the homeowner's investment.\\
\\
TuckpointingVaughan\\
\\
View project: Tuckpointing and Window Sill Restoration in Vaughan, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/vaughan-tuckpointing-west-woodbridge) [![Gallery image 1](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F348358db-11a1-451f-c78f-b970c367cd00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Brick Repair in Toronto, Ontario** \\
\\
A homeowner in Toronto's York Mills neighbourhood needed brick repair—damaged and loose bricks threatened both the structure's integrity and its appearance.\\
\\
The team removed the compromised bricks and sourced Canada Brick Sonoma Bark to match the existing masonry. Each replacement brick was secured with proper wall ties and mortar, restoring the connection to the underlying structure. The work addressed both the visible damage and the structural issues that had developed over time.\\
\\
The completed repair eliminated the loose brickwork and restored a clean, uniform façade. The homeowner now has brick veneer that's properly anchored and built to handle Ontario's weather cycles.\\
\\
Brick RepairToronto\\
\\
View project: Brick Repair in Toronto, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/toronto-brick-repair-york-mills) [![Brick repair in Vaughan - Damaged brick section before restoration](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F931e10a9-8cdb-4a10-03e2-ea540da42a00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Brick Replacement in Vaughan, Ontario** \\
\\
A Vaughan homeowner needed brick work—deteriorating bricks and efflorescence showed where moisture had been getting in.\\
\\
Scaffolding and bracing went up to reach the work area safely. The team replaced the damaged bricks, addressing the sections where the masonry had deteriorated. Efflorescence—those white salt deposits that show up when water moves through brick—was cleaned off using power washing. Fresh caulking sealed gaps where water had been entering.\\
\\
The brickwork is now solid and clean. The homeowner has masonry that's weathertight and ready for Ontario winters.\\
\\
Brick RepairVaughan\\
\\
View project: Brick Replacement in Vaughan, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/vaughan-brick-replacement-thornhill) [![Chimney rebuild in St. Catharines - Before and during reconstruction](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2Fd4f06f81-d5b2-4b12-ad28-bf2764e5bf00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Chimney Rebuild in St. Catharines, Ontario** \\
\\
When the team arrived at this St. Catharines property, the deteriorating chimney presented clear signs it needed rebuilding—the structure sat above the roofline where Ontario weather hits hardest, and it showed.\\
\\
The chimney rebuild required taking down and reconstructing 12-13 courses of brickwork. Full range rug brick went in to match the existing masonry, with each course laid properly and tied into the structure. A new concrete cap went on top to shed water away from the flue and protect the fresh mortar joints underneath. The flashing—the metal barrier between chimney and roof—was repaired to keep water from getting behind the masonry.\\
\\
This St. Catharines chimney is solid and weathertight. The brick matches, the cap is sealed, and the homeowner doesn't have to think about it through another Ontario winter.\\
\\
Chimney RebuildSt. Catharines\\
\\
View project: Chimney Rebuild in St. Catharines, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/st-catharines-chimney-downtown) [![Chimney rebuild in Guelph](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F1f55b26f-9b01-4017-3aaa-e0cca61cee00%2FinstagramPost&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Chimney Rebuild in Guelph, Ontario** \\
\\
A Guelph homeowner needed their chimney rebuilt—21 courses of brick had deteriorated, and the old cap was no longer keeping water out. The chimney sat above the roofline where Ontario weather hits hardest, and it showed.\\
\\
The chimney repair required scaffolding to reach the work area safely. We took down the damaged structure course by course and rebuilt it with Sundance Matte Ontario brick—126 bricks total, matched as close as possible to the existing masonry. A new 8x8 concrete cap went on top to shed water away from the flue and protect the fresh mortar joints underneath.\\
\\
This Guelph chimney rebuild is solid and weathertight. The brick matches, the cap is sealed, and the homeowner doesn't have to think about it through another Ontario winter.\\
\\
Chimney RebuildGuelph\\
\\
View project: Chimney Rebuild in Guelph, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/guelph-chimney-rebuild-hyland) [![Vaughan courtyard wall rebuild project image 1](https://fixmybrick.ca/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimagedelivery.net%2FNzWpQo26ASp3diQUoHHxxA%2F6bf48fa0-f56d-44ee-7243-665e15023a00%2Fpublic&w=2048&q=75)\\
\\
View Project\\
\\
**Courtyard wall rebuild in Vaughan, Ontario** \\
\\
A Vaughan homeowner sought comprehensive masonry restoration for their property, addressing a deteriorating courtyard wall, failing front pillar, and exterior columns requiring simultaneous work while preserving the property's architectural character. The team conducted a thorough assessment and developed a detailed plan to restore structural integrity while enhancing aesthetics.\\
\\
The centerpiece was a complete courtyard wall rebuild. The team dismantled the existing brickwork while preserving the original Indiana limestone caps. After power washing to restore their natural beauty, custom drip edges were created to enhance water management and prevent moisture damage. The wall was reconstructed using heritage beige Ontario-size bricks to match the original design, with a new angle lintel providing superior structural support at openings. Each brick was laid to replicate the original pattern, ensuring seamless integration.\\
\\
At the front entrance, the pillar was completely rebuilt with matched brickwork and a fresh Indiana limestone cap, creating an impressive focal point for curb appeal. On the exterior elevations, deteriorated parging was removed from three columns, surfaces were thoroughly cleaned and treated with bonding agent, then professionally reparged with proper curing to minimize shrinkage cracks.\\
\\
The restoration also included precision brick repair where an obsolete vent opening on the left elevation was infilled using traditional toothing techniques. This method ensures proper bonding and creates a cohesive appearance that makes the repair virtually invisible. All site debris was professionally removed.\\
\\
This comprehensive restoration demonstrates commitment to preserving architectural integrity while incorporating modern waterproofing and structural enhancements. The completed work has revitalized multiple areas—from the reconstructed courtyard wall with elegant limestone caps to the rebuilt pillar and expertly parged columns—each executed with the craftsmanship homeowners throughout the Greater Toronto Area have trusted for over two decades.\\
\\
Courtyard wall rebuildVaughan\\
\\
View project: Courtyard wall rebuild in Vaughan, Ontario](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects/vaughan-courtyard-wall-rebuild-exterior)

[View All Projects](https://fixmybrick.ca/projects)

About Us

## Why Fix My Brick?

Family-owned since 2002. We show up, do it right, and leave it clean.

![Fix My Brick team and crew members with company trucks](https://oveieyfzkpgdaoiwqzaf.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/image_repository/1cb93aca-4004-4acb-8073-5144df8662e7/1763056993257-s73m4yk94t.jpg)

![Professional masonry tools and equipment](https://oveieyfzkpgdaoiwqzaf.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/image_repository/1cb93aca-4004-4acb-8073-5144df8662e7/1763057094666-5v4niyg0paf.jpg)

![Close-up of detailed masonry craftsmanship](https://oveieyfzkpgdaoiwqzaf.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/image_repository/1cb93aca-4004-4acb-8073-5144df8662e7/1763057093519-18u2pf97h66.jpg)

We started in Hamilton over two decades ago. Back then it was a small crew doing what masonry companies do—fixing what's broken, matching what's old, and leaving sites better than we found them.

Today we cover most of Southern Ontario with multiple trucks and trained teams. But we still do things the same way: show up when we say we will, explain what needs doing, and do it properly.

Your home is probably your biggest investment. We treat it that way.

### Trained Crews

Every team member knows masonry. No day labourers, no shortcuts.

### Fully Insured

WSIB covered and liability insured. You're protected from day one.

### Clean Jobsites

We protect your landscaping and clean up completely when we're done.

### Written Warranty

We stand behind our work. Ask about our warranty terms.
